text.title: Gemini Basics Failure Modes
text.summary: Five recurring starter failures with symptom / root-cause / fix.

antipattern.symptom: Key leaked via GitHub; vendor revokes key; service down.
Outputs change overnight when Google rolls a new alias target.
antipattern.root-cause: Alias treated as a model name.

antipattern.description: Mixing streaming and non-streaming in one path.
antipattern.symptom: Half-streamed tokens leak into a UI expecting a full response.
antipattern.root-cause: Toggle behind a config not consistently applied.
antipattern.fix: Commit to one mode per call site (rule r3).

antipattern.description: Asking for JSON via prompt only without response_mime_type.
antipattern.root-cause: Prompt engineering instead of SDK path.

antipattern.symptom: Conversation fails with context-limit error after ~20 turns.
antipattern.fix: FIFO trim by token budget; target ≤ half model context (rule r5).
